---
title: "Data Cleansing Projects"
listing:
  contents: Cleansing_Projects
  type: grid
  sort: "title"
---

Before any analysis can happen, data must be refined. These projects demonstrate my ability to handle missing values, outliers, and inconsistent formatting using Python and Polars.

[MarkDown Basics](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/markdown-basics.html#links-images)
